name: Elevenlabs
description: ElevenLabs voice plugin for text-to-speech generation and conversational audio output.

ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.help: Primary ElevenLabs API key used for authenticating requests

ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID.label: Model Id
ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID.help: Model identifier to use for TTS generation

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.label: Voice Id
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.help: ID of the voice to synthesize with

ELEVENLABS_BROWSER_URL.label: Browser Url
ELEVENLABS_BROWSER_URL.help: Optional browser-safe proxy base URL that injects the API key server-side

ELEVENLABS_STT_DIARIZE.label: Stt Diarize
ELEVENLABS_STT_DIARIZE.help: Enable speaker diarization to identify different speakers

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STYLE.label: Voice Style
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STYLE.help: Style intensity (0-1) for the generated voice

ELEVENLABS_STT_MODEL_ID.label: Stt Model Id
ELEVENLABS_STT_MODEL_ID.help: Model identifier to use for speech-to-text transcription

ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.label: Output Format
ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.help: Audio output format returned by the API (e.g., mp3_44100_128 or pcm_16000)

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STABILITY.label: Voice Stability
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STABILITY.help: Voice stability factor (0-1) influencing consistency of speech

ELEVENLABS_STT_NUM_SPEAKERS.label: Stt Num Speakers
ELEVENLABS_STT_NUM_SPEAKERS.help: Expected number of speakers for diarization (1-32)

ELEVENLABS_STT_LANGUAGE_CODE.label: Stt Language Code
ELEVENLABS_STT_LANGUAGE_CODE.help: Language code for transcription (e.g., 'en', 'es'). Leave empty for automatic detection

ELEVENLABS_STT_TAG_AUDIO_EVENTS.label: Stt Tag Audio Events
ELEVENLABS_STT_TAG_AUDIO_EVENTS.help: Tag audio events like laughter, applause, etc.

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_SIMILARITY_BOOST.label: Voice Similarity Boost
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_SIMILARITY_BOOST.help: Similarity boost factor (0-1) affecting how closely the voice matches the target

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_USE_SPEAKER_BOOST.label: Voice Use Speaker Boost
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_USE_SPEAKER_BOOST.help: Flag to enable or disable speaker boost feature

ELEVENLABS_OPTIMIZE_STREAMING_LATENCY.label: Optimize Streaming Latency
ELEVENLABS_OPTIMIZE_STREAMING_LATENCY.help: Latency optimization level for streaming audio (0-4)
